title: SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS - 211info
text: THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Represents adults and children seeking social security disability benefits (SSI and SSD). Services include assisting individuals by preparing initial applications and function reports, handling appeals, representation at hearings, and representation in federal court appeals if necessary. 820 SW 2nd Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted; anyone seeking social security disability benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 228-5222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-5222 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to make an appointment FEES: By law, no social security disability attorney may charge a legal fee unless the case is won. The fee is limited to 25% of the past-due benefits you are awarded, up to a maximum of $6,000. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 2nd and Yamhill, entrance on 2nd. Around the corner from the Yamhill District MAX stop. Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues Social Security Disability Insurance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST
